ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result entry */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the test conducted */,
  "test_joint_acc" REAL /* Joint accuracy of the dialogue system for this round */,
  "test_slot_acc" REAL /* Slot accuracy of the dialogue system for this round */,
  "joint_acc_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of joint accuracy */,
  "slot_acc_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of slot accuracy */,
  "num_labelled_dialogue_turns" INTEGER /* Number of labelled dialogue turns in the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_round FOREIGN KEY ("round") REFERENCES test_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test round configuration and conditions */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date on which the test round was conducted */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted (e.g., cloud, local) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the test data (e.g., user-provided, generated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the testing process (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dialogue_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dialogue agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the dialogue agent */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the agent being tested */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent's capabilities and features */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the dialogue agent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the agent was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., joint accuracy, slot accuracy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric's significance and calculation */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric (e.g., minimum accuracy required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_test_results" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dialogue agent tested */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date on which the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id", "result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities and scope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test round associated with this configuration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter used in the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES test_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test round associated with this data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the test data (e.g., user-provided, generated) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES test_rounds ("round_id")
)
